stemHtml: In the event that an emergency landing must be initiated:

options.a: The aircraft must be landed as soon as possible, regardless of the suitability of the landing area.
options.b: Passengers should be advised of emergency actions they should take as appropriate to the situation.
options.c: The pilots do NOT need to consider the possibility of hazard to persons or property on the ground.
options.d: ATC must be advised as a first priority, before descending, in order to avoid loss of radio contact.
